response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer with over 18 years in the field and a commendable initiative in open-source and knowledge sharing. His recent work in AI agent infrastructure is relevant. However, there is a significant mismatch with the core requirements of this Director-level strategic role. His career progression has been towards a senior individual contributor (Staff Engineer), not a strategic leader defining company-wide AI direction. His AI experience appears tactical and recent, lacking the depth, product leadership, and customer-facing advisory experience expected for a Principal Engineer in an AI Strategy capacity.
strengths: Extensive (18+ years) and diverse software engineering background.
Recent hands-on experience with AI agent infrastructure.
Strong initiative shown by founding an open-source project and community leadership.
concerns: Experience is at the Staff Engineer level, not the required Director-level.
AI experience appears tactical and recent, not deep and strategic.
Lacks experience defining company-wide strategy or advising enterprise customers.

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI Strategy and Leadership Experience
